_comment: Submission artifact for the Anthropic official plugin marketplace. Format approximated from the public schema of the anthropics/claude-plugins repo (April 2026). Submit as a PR adding this file under plugins/visionary-claude/plugin.json (or the current repo convention). Maintainer: verify exact schema before filing the PR.
name: visionary-claude
summary: 202 design styles, 8-step weighted-random selection algorithm, Playwright + axe-core visual critique loop, DINOv2 visual embeddings + MLLM judge tie-breaker, structural-integrity gate (6 hard-fail checks before LLM-critic), DTCG token export, cross-session taste calibration. Verified benchmark delta: +5.75 points over generic-slop baseline on 10 representative prompts.

commands.name: visionary
commands.description: Generate a single component via the 8-step algorithm

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Lock a chosen style across the product, emit DTCG tokens

commands.name: designer
commands.description: Apply a named-designer taste profile (Rams, Kowalski, Vignelli, Scher, Greiman)

commands.name: import-artifact
commands.description: Import a Claude.ai Artifact into a Visionary-managed project

agents.name: visual-critic
agents.description: 8-dimension aesthetic scoring agent (axe-core + DINOv2 ONNX visual embeddings + MLLM judge tie-breaker, structural-integrity gate pre-flight)

hooks.description: Framework detection (Next 16, Tailwind v4, Motion v12, Base UI, DTCG)

screenshots.alt: Visionary for Claude Code — 202 design styles, 8-step algorithm, motion-first
